title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at CRISIL

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at CRISIL
jsonLd.description:
CRISIL is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CRISIL:
CRISIL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CRISIL!
